@startuml
package "こどものぼーる" {
  frame req_自主的な取り組みを促す <<requirement>> as rootReq {
    requirement "楽しいで取り組めるようにする\nText=" as funRequirement1
    requirement "継続してとりくめるようにする\nText=" as contRequirement2
    
    functionalRequirement "他の人のフォームと比べることができる\nText=" as compareFormFR3
    functionalRequirement "使用履歴を確認できるようにする\nText=" as checkHistoryFR4
    
    functionalRequirement "プロのフォームと比べることができる\nText=" as proCompareFR5
    functionalRequirement "自分の昔のフォームと比べることができる\nText=" as pastSelfCompareFR6
    functionalRequirement "カレンダーで確認ができる\nText=\" calendarCheckFR7
    
    note right of rootReq : Text=
    
    ' Relationships from requirements to main goal 
    deriveReqt --> rootReq : derivesTo(funRequirement)
    deriveReqt --> rootReq : derivesTo(contRequirement) 
    
     % Functional Requirements deriving higher-level ones  
      %% Left branch - comparing forms functionality tree structure starts here...      
       <<<deriveReqt>>> --|>compareFormFR3   
        <left>--proCompareFR5        
         <-pastSelfCompareFR6         
          >-- NPV IRR  tidy organize arrange sort filter search find locate identify discover explore investigate research study examine inspect observe watch listen read write speak talk discuss
